description: This is the covariance matrix, returned as an array: [number of bands, number of bands, _number of ROIs_].
This is the maximum data value, returned as an array: [number of bands, _number of ROIs_].
This is the mean data value, returned as an array: [number of bands, _number of ROIs_].
This is the minimum data value, returned as an array: [number of bands, _number of ROIs_].
This is an array of RGB triplets representing the ROI colors as defined by the ENVIROIs.
This is an array of ROI names as defined by the input ENVIROIs.
This is the number of pixels for each ROI, returned as an array: [_number of ROIs_].
This is the standard deviation, returned as an array: [number of bands, _number of ROIs_].
Outputs from running the tool. These should *NEVER* be specified and are returned.
